events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday, known for hits like 'Jenny from the Block' and 'On The Floor'.

angles.name: J.Lo's enduring career
angles.copy: From the Bronx to the biggest stages, J.Lo continues to dominate. What's your favourite Jennifer Lopez track to get you moving?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's energy
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! What's your go-to Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'
events.blurb: MTV, the iconic music television channel, first launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its inaugural music video.

angles.name: MTV's ironic start
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV launched with a song that ironically predicted its own future. 'Video Killed The Radio Star' – still a banger though, right?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, launching them into global stardom.

angles.name: Britpop's big bang
angles.copy: 32 years since 'Definitely Maybe' dropped and changed the game. What's your favourite track from Oasis's iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years of peace and music
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, bringing together half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'.

angles.name: Woodstock's legacy
angles.copy: 57 years since Woodstock defined a generation. Which iconic performance would you have loved to witness live?

events.title: Elvis Presley: 49 years since his passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His music and legend live forever. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tupac Shakur: 30 years since the tragic shooting in Las Vegas
events.blurb: September 7, 1996, marks 30 years since rap icon Tupac Shakur was fatally shot in Las Vegas, passing away on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's enduring influence
angles.copy: 30 years on, Tupac's music and message still resonate. Remembering a true hip-hop legend.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix: 56 years since his passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the world lost guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Hendrix's legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years since we lost a true guitar god. His influence is still felt today.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969, featuring classic tracks and that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road's timeless appeal
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. Still one of the most recognisable album covers ever. What's your top track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the iconic frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Hynde's rock longevity
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking as hard as ever. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, and celebrated solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam's rock 'n' roll spirit
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite tune from the rock 'n' roll star?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single on October 11, 1971, and as part of the album 'Imagine' on September 9, 1971.

angles.name: The power of Imagine
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that still inspires peace and unity. What does this iconic track mean to you?

events.title: The first iPod was released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple launched its revolutionary first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, forever changing how we listen to music.

angles.name: The iPod revolution
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago it arrived and put '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How many did you own?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is officially James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune? Let us know!

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today, we remember the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Lennon's enduring spirit
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British actor, comedian, and writer, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy legend Cleese
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their experimental double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The White Album's impact
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles gave us the sprawling 'White Album'. A true masterpiece of diverse sounds. What's your standout track?
